name: cryopur.com
message: CryoPur is a French company specializing in advanced cryogenic technology for biogas purification and liquefaction. Founded in 2015, the company developed a patented process that converts raw biogas into bio-LNG (liquefied biomethane) and liquid CO₂ of very high purity. Their systems are used in agricultural, industrial, wastewater, and landfill biogas facilities. CryoPur was acquired by FDE (La Française de l’Énergie), which now owns 94% of the company. CryoPur is headquartered in Massy, Île-de-France, France.
